name: HSA Contributions via Salary Reduction

eligibility.description: Available to employees covered under a high-deductible health plan (HDHP) through an employer-sponsored cafeteria plan.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Employees can elect to have the employer make contributions to a Health Savings Account (HSA) on a pre-tax basis through a cafeteria plan, avoiding both income and FICA taxes.
